api_key.description: lu.ma API key, sent as the x-luma-api-key header. Never logged.

base_url.description: lu.ma API base URL override for tests or proxies.

event_api_id.description: lu.ma event api_id; required by the event_guests and event_hosts streams.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
